title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 04 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 04/03/2025
Image reference: 2025-03-04_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-04-2025_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker Values have firmed for larger tonnage in the last week owing to sales of vessels such as Frontier Garland
Capesize BC Frontier Garland (181,500 DWT, Mar 2011, Imabari) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 31 mil, VV Value USD 29.99 mil
Kamsarmax BC Ellina (82,600 DWT, Oct 2008, Tsuneishi Zhoushan) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 12.75 mil, VV Value USD 12.96 mil
Supramax BC Evropi (53,700 DWT, Apr 2005, Tsuneishi Zhoushan) sold SS/DD due to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 7.5 mil, VV Value USD 6.46 mil
Handy BC Western Fedora (37,000 DWT, Jul 2012, Hyundai Mipo) sold DD due to undisclosed buyers for USD 14 mil, VV Value USD 13.81 mil
Tankers: Older tonnage Suezmax VV values firming slightly owing to a recent en bloc deal while LR1 and MR values have declined across the board
VLCC Princess Alexia (306,400 DWT, Oct 2004, Mitsubishi HI) sold to Unknown Taiwanese buyers for USD 37 mil, VV Value USD 35.05 mil
Suezmax Goldway & DIamondway (157,800 DWT, 2016, Sungdong) sold en bloc to Nordic American Tankers for USD 136mil, VV Value USD
